---
title: "Transformers and Large Language Models"
subtitle: "NLP Lecture 2026 — Traitement du Langage Naturel"
author:
  - name: Christophe Ambroise
    orcid: 0000-0002-8148-0346
    email: christophe.ambroise@univ-evry.fr
    affiliations: UEVE, UMR CNRS 8071
date: last-modified
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  error: true
format:
  clean-revealjs:
    html-math-method: mathjax
    scrollable: true
    transition: convex
    embed-resources: true
    echo: false

  revealjs:
    theme: league
    html-math-method: mathjax
    scrollable: true
    transition: convex
    embed-resources: true
    echo: false
    width: 2400
    height: 1350
    margin: 0.1
    min-scale: 0.2
    max-scale: 2.0


  pdf:
    number-sections: true
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-depth: 2
    documentclass: scrartcl
    mainfont: "Times New Roman"
    fontsize: 11pt

  beamer:
    slide-level: 2
    aspectratio: 169
    theme: Madrid
    colortheme: dolphin
    header-includes: |
      \usepackage{xcolor}
      \definecolor{UEVEblue}{RGB}{65,89,122}
      \definecolor{UEVEorange}{RGB}{217,97,37}
      \setbeamercolor{frametitle}{bg=UEVEblue, fg=white}
      \setbeamercolor{palette primary}{bg=UEVEblue,fg=white}
      \setbeamercolor{palette secondary}{bg=UEVEblue,fg=white}
      \setbeamercolor{palette tertiary}{bg=UEVEblue,fg=white}
      \setbeamercolor{palette quaternary}{bg=UEVEblue,fg=white}
      \setbeamercolor{structure}{fg=UEVEorange}
      \setbeamercolor{section in toc}{fg=UEVEblue}
    fonttheme: professionalfonts
---

{{< include ../chapters/transformers.qmd >}}
